name: Dagi Giyim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Dagi Giyim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. operates in the garment industry in Turkey and internationally. It primarily produces and sells underwear, nighties, dresses, T-shirts, trousers, capri, shorts, sweatshirts, sportswear, thermal bottom and tops, maternity nightgowns, swimsuits, socks, and beach and household products for men, women, and children. The company sells its products through online and retail stores. Dagi Giyim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1984 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
